titleStmt.title: SII 31.37: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 37. (A.R. No. B 321 of 1938.) MALYĀLA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar set up behind the Śiva temple.
It is dated Śaka 1212, Vikṛiti, Vaiśākha, Śu 15, Thursday corresponding to 1290 A.D. April, 26 (f.d.t. 11). Wednesday.

It refers to the establishment of maṭha (laumu) at Malyāla by Sarvēśvarayya and registers the gift of land measuring 10 puṭṭis of black cotton soil (rēgaḍu), garden (tōmṭa) and wet land (nīrnēla) to Sarvvēsvarāyaṁgāru by Rudradēva, the son of Bollayareḍḍi mahāmandslēśvara of Kākatīya Rudrakomara i.e. Pratāparudra. It further records the gift of clayee soil measuring one puṭṭi by certain Pōtināyaka probably to Sarvvēśvarayya.

It further records the renewal of gift lands stituated at Svētavāhana kōṭa (Sātāni Koṭa), Nandikoṭṭakura. Dēvanūru, Karivena, Kannamadukalam, Tēkūru, Miḍavēmula, (Pasuluru) Anumgoṇḍa and other areas to Mahādēva, the elder son of his brother Sadāsivayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayā
bhyudaya śa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu
1212 Āga vi
kruti saṁvatsara
vaiśākha śuddha 15 gu
svasti . śrī manma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara kā
katīya rudraku
māruṁḍu Ōrugaṁṭa
ṁbridhivi rājyamu
nēyucuṁḍagānu svasti .
śrīmanmahā sāma
ṁta ceṟaku bo
llayaraḍḍivārikoḍku
rudradēvaṁḍu svasti
śrī sa¨rvēśvaraṁ
gāriki Iccinavrittu
lu naṁdikoṭṭakūrānu
tū¨rpunaṟēgaḍu
padivuṭlu Uttarāna tō
ṁṭa siramu Ātukūra nī
rnēla maṟtu Oruvakaṁ
ṭa ṟēgaḍu pōcināyani
Īviṁ jelliṁceṁdi puṭṭeṁ
ḍu

pū¨rvvāna
bollayare
ḍḍivārināṁḍu
cellēṭivrittu
lu svētavāha
na kōṭanu
ṟēgaḍu puṭṭeṁ
ḍu naṁdiko
ṭṭūkūranu pa
ḍumaṭa pa
ṁdumu dēvu
nūranu paṁ
dumu karive
nanu paṁdumu
kannamaḍukalaṁ
baṁdumu . na
ṟavāḍivi laṁ
jyaprōlanu I
ruvuṭṭi tēkūra
neṁdamu mi
davēmulaṁ bu
ṭṭeṁḍu pussu
ḻūraṁ buṭṭe
ṁḍu Anuṁ
goṁḍaṁ baṁ
dumu muḍu
manaṁ guṟikiṁ
buṭṭeṁḍu

belugali nirnēla
maṟuturu vēluga
ḍu puṭṭeṁḍu cēnugoṁ
ḍanu ṟēgaḍu padēṁḍu
mu Aṭṭu vrittulu
Iṁtavaṭṭunnu Ā sa¨rvvē
śvarayyaṁgāru ma
lyālanu laumugaṭṭiṁ
cina maṭhamunaṁ
tama Annasadāśiva
yyaṁgāri koḍku ma
hādēvani nilpi Icciri .
Digital edition of SII 31.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
